source_rationale: RGS5 is a pericyte/perivascular marker highly expressed in this DDX4+ sorted population, suggesting perivascular identity
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a canonical marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells enriched in this population
TAGLN (transgelin) is a smooth muscle marker consistent with perivascular cell identity in this DDX4 antibody-positive fraction
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker commonly used to identify perivascular cells in the ovary
NOTCH3 is a key signaling receptor expressed in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
PDGFRB is a canonical pericyte marker involved in vascular development and perivascular cell recruitment
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain specific to contractile smooth muscle/perivascular cells
Phospholamban (PLN) is expressed in smooth muscle cells and regulates calcium handling in contractile perivascular cells
Decorin (DCN) is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical marker of stromal/fibroblast cells in the ovary, distinguishing them from perivascular cells
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen, a major extracellular matrix component produced by ovarian stromal fibroblasts
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed in ovarian stromal cells involved in tissue remodeling
STAR (steroidogenic acute regulatory protein) is essential for steroidogenesis in ovarian theca/stromal cells
ALDH1A1 is involved in retinoic acid synthesis and is expressed in ovarian stromal progenitor cells
Midkine (MDK) is a growth factor expressed in ovarian stromal cells involved in cell proliferation and differentiation
Claudin-11 is a tight junction protein expressed in ovarian stromal cells contributing to tissue barrier function
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis and produced exclusively by endothelial cells
Claudin-5 is an endothelial-specific tight junction protein essential for vascular barrier function
CD34 is a well-established surface marker of vascular endothelial cells and endothelial progenitors
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor critical for vascular tube formation
CLEC14A is an endothelial-specific C-type lectin receptor involved in angiogenesis
PTPRB (VE-PTP) is an endothelial-specific receptor tyrosine phosphatase regulating vascular integrity
Endomucin is a sialomucin selectively expressed on endothelial cells of veins and capillaries
TIE1 is an endothelial-specific receptor tyrosine kinase essential for vascular development
ROBO4 is an endothelial-specific guidance receptor that maintains vascular integrity
Aquaporin-1 is a water channel highly expressed in endothelial cells facilitating transcellular water transport
CALCRL is the adrenomedullin receptor expressed on endothelial cells regulating vascular tone
Anti-Müllerian hormone is a canonical granulosa cell marker produced by growing follicles to regulate folliculogenesis
FOXL2 is a master transcription factor essential for granulosa cell identity and ovarian differentiation
Inhibin alpha is produced by granulosa cells and is a key marker of granulosa cell endocrine function
WFDC2 (HE4) is highly expressed in granulosa cells and is a well-known ovarian biomarker
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells reflecting their epithelial-like character
HSD17B1 is a steroidogenic enzyme converting estrone to estradiol, characteristic of granulosa cell function
GSTA1 is a glutathione S-transferase highly expressed in granulosa cells for protection against oxidative stress
EMX2 is a transcription factor involved in gonadal development and expressed in granulosa cells
TNNI3 is highly upregulated in granulosa cells and has been identified as a marker of early granulosa cell populations
WNT6 is a Wnt ligand expressed in granulosa cells involved in follicle development signaling
Desmoplakin is a desmosomal protein reflecting the epithelial cell-cell adhesion characteristic of granulosa cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an immune cell signaling adaptor expressed in myeloid and NK cells
CD69 is an early activation marker expressed on activated lymphocytes and tissue-resident immune cells
PTPRC (CD45) is the canonical pan-leukocyte marker expressed on all immune cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by T cells and NK cells for immune cell recruitment
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes including NK cells and cytotoxic T cells
CD52 is a glycoprotein broadly expressed on lymphocytes and monocytes, used as a pan-immune marker
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid and NK cells for immune signaling
AIF1 (IBA1) is expressed in macrophages and microglia, marking myeloid immune cells
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor broadly expressed on immune cells mediating homing and migration
C1QA is a complement component produced by tissue-resident macrophages in the immune compartment
CD163 is a scavenger receptor and canonical marker of tissue-resident macrophages/monocyte-derived cells
CD14 is a co-receptor for LPS and a canonical monocyte/macrophage surface marker
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed by tissue-resident macrophages derived from monocytes
CSF1R (CD115) is the macrophage colony-stimulating factor receptor essential for monocyte/macrophage differentiation
Lysozyme is a canonical monocyte/macrophage marker involved in innate antimicrobial defense
FOLR2 is a marker of tissue-resident macrophages, particularly in the ovary and other tissues
FCGR2A (CD32) is an Fc gamma receptor expressed on monocytes/macrophages for immune complex recognition
LYVE1 marks a subset of tissue-resident macrophages associated with perivascular niches
Stabilin-1 is a scavenger receptor expressed on tissue-resident macrophages involved in clearance functions
MAFB is a transcription factor driving monocyte-to-macrophage differentiation
MRC1L1 is related to the mannose receptor family expressed on macrophages for pathogen recognition
MS4A7 is a membrane-spanning protein specifically expressed in monocytes and macrophages
ZP3 encodes zona pellucida glycoprotein 3, an oocyte-specific structural protein essential for fertilization
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis and oocyte gene expression
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes required for early embryonic development
DPPA3 (Stella) is an oocyte and germ cell-specific gene involved in epigenetic reprogramming
SOHLH2 is a germ cell-specific transcription factor essential for oogenesis and early follicle development
LHX8 is an oocyte-specific transcription factor required for oocyte survival and follicle maintenance
TUBB8 is an oocyte-specific beta-tubulin essential for meiotic spindle assembly
KPNA7 is an oocyte-specific importin alpha involved in nuclear transport during oocyte maturation
ZAR1 is an oocyte-specific RNA-binding protein essential for the oocyte-to-embryo transition
OOSP2 is an oocyte-secreted protein specifically expressed in oocytes
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for chromosome synapsis in oocytes
FOXR1 is a forkhead transcription factor with oocyte-enriched expression involved in oocyte development
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker and regulator of G-protein signaling in perivascular cells
ACTA2 (alpha-SMA) is a canonical smooth muscle/pericyte marker defining contractile perivascular cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein marking perivascular/smooth muscle cells
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain specific to vascular smooth muscle and pericytes
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker used for identification of perivascular cells
NOTCH3 is a receptor critical for pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell specification and maintenance
PDGFRB is the canonical pericyte receptor essential for pericyte recruitment to blood vessels
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells regulating calcium signaling in contractile perivascular cells
MYL9 is a myosin regulatory light chain expressed in smooth muscle and pericytes
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene highly expressed in pericytes regulating mitochondrial function
Decorin is a hallmark stromal proteoglycan abundantly expressed in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell marker distinguishing stromal from perivascular cells
COL1A1 encodes type I collagen, the primary extracellular matrix protein produced by stromal fibroblasts
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking stromal/mesenchymal cells in the ovary
Osteoglycin is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan expressed in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
Lumican is a stromal proteoglycan involved in collagen fibril organization in connective tissue
STAR is a steroidogenic enzyme expressed in theca-interstitial stromal cells of the ovary
C1S complement component is produced by ovarian stromal fibroblasts as part of local complement production
APOE is expressed in ovarian stromal cells involved in lipid metabolism and steroidogenesis support
COL1A2 encodes the alpha-2 chain of type I collagen, a major stromal extracellular matrix component
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex and a definitive T cell lineage marker
CD3E is a core T cell receptor signaling component and canonical pan-T cell marker
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes and indicates a CD8+ T cell population
CD8B is the beta chain of the CD8 co-receptor specific to cytotoxic T cells
Granzyme K is expressed by effector memory CD8+ T cells and marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector T cells and is a hallmark of activated T lymphocytes
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on naive and memory T cells and is a key T cell survival receptor
Granzyme A is a serine protease in cytotoxic T cells mediating target cell apoptosis
CD2 is a T cell surface glycoprotein involved in T cell activation and adhesion
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on NK-T cells and subsets of T cells including mucosal-associated invariant T cells
RUNX3 is a transcription factor essential for CD8+ T cell differentiation and cytotoxic function
Interferon-gamma is the signature cytokine of activated T cells mediating cellular immunity
